entries.source: "Help me learn supply and demand"
entries.value: "मलाई माग र आपूर्तिको बारेमा सिक्न मद्दत गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: "Teach me financial modeling"
entries.value: "मलाई वित्तीय मोडलिङ सिकाउनुहोस्"

entries.source: "Teach me Porter's Five Forces"
entries.value: "मलाई पोर्टरको पाँच बल (Porter's Five Forces) सिकाउनुहोस्"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Interactive Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Foundations learning का लागि inspir मा Interactive Instruction प्रयोग गर्ने व्यावहारिक guide, prompt, study loop र सुरक्षित AI बानी सहित।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अझ बलियो study loop

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: session लाई तपाईंको लक्ष्य अनुसार अनुकूल बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Adaptive lessons that make you do.
entries.value: तपाईंलाई गर्न लगाउने adaptive lessons।

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer भन्दा सानो first step माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI लाई result मात्र होइन, तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory बाट idea फिर्ता लेखेर finish गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: आधारभूत कुराहरू

entries.source: Interactive Instruction
entries.value: अन्तरक्रियात्मक निर्देशन

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: गरेर, हेरेर, तुलना गरेर, repair गरेर, र mastery prove गरेर सिक्नुहोस्। app ले instruction लाई long chat मा बदल्नुको सट्टा तपाईंको goal वरिपरि live lesson canvas बनाउँछ। प्रयास गर्नुहोस्: "Teach me financial modeling."

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: आधारभूत विषयहरू खोज्ने विद्यार्थीहरू जसले सामान्य उत्तर बाकसको सट्टा व्यावहारिक मार्गदर्शन चाहन्छन्।

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: try गर्ने prompts

entries.source: Start the live mode at Interactive Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Quiz me on Trivia. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Interactive Instruction मा live mode सुरु गर्नुहोस्। neighbouring learning format चाहनुहुन्छ भने Quiz me on Trivia try गर्नुहोस्। platform को broader view का लागि AI learning companion ले सबैका लागि के गर्नुपर्छ पढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: example prompts बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: mode लाई तपाईं के सिक्न वा produce गर्न खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: त्यो difference flow मा देखिन्छ। एउटा giant response को सट्टा best sessions loop हुँदै अघि बढ्छन्: goal set गर्नुहोस्, केही try गर्नुहोस्, feedback पाउनुहोस्, weak spot repair गर्नुहोस्, र next action choose गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: त्यो focus महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। general chatbot ले लगभग सबै कुरा answer गर्न सक्छ, तर learning mode ले conversation लाई shape दिन्छ। यसले idea stick हुन मद्दत गर्ने thinking, practice, feedback, वा exploration तर्फ तपाईंलाई nudge गर्छ।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: यो cheating नगरी AI सँग study गर्ने same habit हो: learner active राख्नुहोस्। AI तपाईंको thinking मा feedback दिँदा सबैभन्दा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: यो mode विशेष रूपमा यस्ता learners का लागि useful छ जो चाहन्छन्:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for interactive instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: यो mode interactive instruction का लागि आफ्नै prompts, examples, र learning flow सहित tuned छ।

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: चरणलाई आफ्नै शब्दमा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Interactive Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: छिटो सुरु हुने तर तपाईंअनुसार adapt हुने session चाहनुहुन्छ भने Interactive Instruction प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। पहिलो goal प्रभावशाली सुनिनु होइन। पहिलो goal अर्को step सम्भव महसुस गराउनु हो।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: यो mode ले केमा मद्दत गर्छ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: अब कहाँ जाने

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तपाईं आफ्नो वास्तविक समस्याको rough version बाट पनि सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। messy first prompt ठीकै छ। सुरु गरेपछि session ले level, audience, deadline, र style clarify गर्न सक्छ।
